context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Positive reaction state triggered when player pets/strokes Echo
context.screen_position: Center at x=64px, y=60px, with slight side-to-side movement during animation
adjacent_elements: heart_particle (spawns above Echo at x=64px, y=30-40px, rises upward)
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when player taps/clicks Echo to pet. Plays once, showing Echo's joyful reaction. Heart particles spawn during animation. Lasts 2 seconds then transitions back to idle. Increases happiness and relationship level.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with crest fully raised (7-8px tall, up from 3-5px normal). Body sways side to side. Wings slightly spread from body (2-3px gap on each side). Overall posture is upright and energetic.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, hand-drawn with energetic, lively feel

animation.description: Frame 1: Crest raises to full height. Frame 2: Body tilts left 2-3px. Frame 3: Body center. Frame 4: Body tilts right 2-3px. Frame 5: Wings spread slightly (2px gap). Frame 6: Wings return, body tilts left. Frame 7: Body tilts right. Frame 8: Return to neutral, crest lowers. Total duration: 2 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Crest extends to 7-8px height (nearly double idle height). Eyes remain open and bright. Cheek patches fully visible at 4x4px. Wings create 2-3px gap from body when spread. Body sways 2-3px left/right from center. Heart particles (4x4px, #FF004D) spawn at frames 2, 4, 6 above Echo's head.

relationships.shared_with: Same base colors and structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: Unlike idle: crest fully raised, body sways dynamically, wings spread. Unlike singing: no open beak, no music notes. Unlike eating: upright posture, no downward lean.

explicit_negations: No color changes from base palette
